tint.$description: Surface tint color mixed into elevated surfaces. M3 md.sys.color.surface-tint (= primary; tone 40 light, 80 dark via the brand ramp). onmars: the brand accent — MarsUI elevation is shadow-based, so the tint stays the primary accent.

secondary-med-em.$description: Secondary accent surface. M3 md.sys.color.secondary (secondary tone 40 light / 80 dark). onmars is a single-accent theme: the secondary accent resolves to the primary accent surface.

secondary-low-em.$description: Secondary container surface. M3 md.sys.color.secondary-container (secondary tone 90 light / 30 dark). onmars single-accent: resolves to the primary container equivalent.

tertiary-med-em.$description: Tertiary accent surface. M3 md.sys.color.tertiary (tertiary tone 40 light / 80 dark). onmars is a single-accent theme: the tertiary accent resolves to the primary accent surface.

tertiary-low-em.$description: Tertiary container surface. M3 md.sys.color.tertiary-container (tertiary tone 90 light / 30 dark). onmars single-accent: resolves to the primary container equivalent.

secondary-on-primary-light.$description: semantic color for text secondary on primary light.

primary-on-secondary.$description: Primary-emphasis text on the secondary accent surface. M3 md.sys.color.on-secondary (secondary tone 100 light / 20 dark). onmars single-accent: resolves to text primary on primary.

primary-on-secondary-light.$description: Primary-emphasis text on the secondary container surface. M3 md.sys.color.on-secondary-container (secondary tone 10 light / 90 dark). onmars single-accent: resolves to text primary on primary light.

primary-on-tertiary.$description: Primary-emphasis text on the tertiary accent surface. M3 md.sys.color.on-tertiary (tertiary tone 100 light / 20 dark). onmars single-accent: resolves to text primary on primary.

primary-on-tertiary-light.$description: Primary-emphasis text on the tertiary container surface. M3 md.sys.color.on-tertiary-container (tertiary tone 10 light / 90 dark). onmars single-accent: resolves to text primary on primary light.

text-on-neutral.$description: semantic color for text text on neutral.

inverse-white.$description: semantic color for text inverse white.

inverse-black.$description: semantic color for text inverse black.

inverse-primary.$description: Primary accent legible on the inverse surface. M3 md.sys.color.inverse-primary (primary tone 80 light / 40 dark). onmars: the opposite-scheme primary text tone (brand 300 light, brand 600 dark).

primary-high-em.$description: semantic color for text primary high em.

primary-med-em.$description: semantic color for text primary med em.

primary-low-em.$description: semantic color for text primary low em.

info-high-em.$description: Darkened 600->800 in the light-scheme SOURCES (badge AA on the base-em tint; 010 D2 contingency, founder sign-off at merge). Reaches three of four contexts: onmars light, material3 light AND material3 dark — m3 defines no info/warning overrides, so its dark inherits these values by cascade; only onmars dark is pinned by the dark-mode file.

warning-high-em.$description: Darkened 600->800 in the light-scheme SOURCES (badge AA on the base-em tint; 010 D2 contingency, founder sign-off at merge). Reaches three of four contexts: onmars light, material3 light AND material3 dark — m3 defines no info/warning overrides, so its dark inherits these values by cascade; only onmars dark is pinned by the dark-mode file.

hover.$description: Hover interaction state layer. M3 md.sys.state.hover.state-layer-opacity: 8% of the on-color. onmars: the MarsUI hover_overlay (White/5 light, Black/5 dark).

focus.$description: Focus interaction state layer. M3 md.sys.state.focus.state-layer-opacity: 12% of the on-color. onmars: MarsUI overlay one step above hover_overlay (White/8 light, Black/8 dark).

pressed.$description: Pressed interaction state layer. M3 md.sys.state.pressed.state-layer-opacity: 12% of the on-color (same as focus). onmars: MarsUI overlay one step above hover_overlay (White/8 light, Black/8 dark).

dragged.$description: Dragged interaction state layer. M3 md.sys.state.dragged.state-layer-opacity: 16% of the on-color. onmars: MarsUI overlay two steps above hover_overlay (White/12 light, Black/12 dark).

shadow-med.$description: semantic color for elevation shadow med.

shadow-dark.$description: semantic color for elevation shadow dark.

e1.$description: MarsUI Elevation/e1. Scheme-aware: every layer colors through ki.elevation.shadow.

backdrop-blur.$description: MarsUI Blur/24 as the component glass backdrop. Components consume this semantic name for backdrop-filter: blur(...) — never the ki.blur primitive directly (primitive-css-consumption gate).

shadow.$description: MarsUI Component_effect/primary_default: drop 0/1/1/-0.5 plus inner White/12 0/3/3. Pair with backdrop-filter blur(var(--ki-effect-component-backdrop-blur)) — CSS cannot mix backdrop blur into box-shadow.
MarsUI Component_effect/primary_hover: drops 0/20/20/-12 + 0/3/3/-1.5 + 0/1/1/-0.5 plus inner White/18 0/3/3. Pair with backdrop-filter blur(var(--ki-effect-component-backdrop-blur)).
MarsUI Component_effect/secondary_default: drop 0/2/1.5/-0.5 plus inner White/3 0/2/3. Pair with backdrop-filter blur(var(--ki-effect-component-backdrop-blur)).
MarsUI Component_effect/secondary_hover: drops as primary_hover plus inner White/8 0/2/3. Pair with backdrop-filter blur(var(--ki-effect-component-backdrop-blur)).

primary.$description: MarsUI Focus/primary: 3px spread focus ring of the MarsUI style Outline/primary_base_em_alpha = brand 500 at 40% (Kimen name: outline.primary-low-em-alpha / brand.500-alpha-4; the Kimen outline.primary-base-em-alpha resolves to 20% and does not match the Figma Focus style — specs/002-ki-button/design-extraction.md §2.5).

gray.$description: MarsUI Focus/gray: 3px spread focus ring of Outline/med_em (scheme-aware via the outline token).

block.$description: Deprecated alias kept for pre-Fase-1 consumers; use ki.space.xl.

control.$description: Deprecated alias kept for pre-Fase-1 consumers; use ki.radius.md.

short-1.$description: Shortest step of the duration scale. M3 md.sys.motion.duration.short1 (50ms). onmars: the MarsUI single-speed language (120ms), short steps collapse onto ki.duration.fast.

medium-1.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.medium1 (250ms). onmars: MarsUI moderate step (240ms, 2x the 120ms base).

medium-2.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.medium2 (300ms). onmars: MarsUI moderate step (240ms).

medium-3.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.medium3 (350ms). onmars: MarsUI moderate step (240ms).

medium-4.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.medium4 (400ms). onmars: MarsUI moderate step (240ms).

long-1.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.long1 (450ms). onmars: MarsUI slow step (360ms, 3x the 120ms base).

long-2.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.long2 (500ms). onmars: MarsUI slow step (360ms).

long-3.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.long3 (550ms). onmars: MarsUI slow step (360ms).

long-4.$description: M3 md.sys.motion.duration.long4 (600ms). onmars: MarsUI slow step (360ms).

emphasized.$description: Expressive hero-transition curve. M3 md.sys.motion.easing.emphasized. onmars: the MarsUI standard curve (single-curve language).

emphasized-decelerate.$description: Expressive entrance curve. M3 md.sys.motion.easing.emphasized-decelerate. onmars: the MarsUI decelerate curve (ki.easing.out).

emphasized-accelerate.$description: Expressive exit curve. M3 md.sys.motion.easing.emphasized-accelerate. onmars: the MarsUI accelerate curve (ki.easing.in).

standard-decelerate.$description: Utility entrance curve. M3 md.sys.motion.easing.standard-decelerate. onmars: the MarsUI decelerate curve (ki.easing.out).

standard-accelerate.$description: Utility exit curve. M3 md.sys.motion.easing.standard-accelerate. onmars: the MarsUI accelerate curve (ki.easing.in).
